name: Fast_IO

documentation.description:
`Read` needs some extra info not available with Ada.Streams.Root_Stream_Type.
See zip.adb of the Zip-Ada project for an implementation.

subprograms.name: Write
subprograms.code: procedure Write (s : in out Ada.Streams.Root_Stream_Type'Class; b : in Byte_Array)

formals.name: Byte_Array
formals.code: type Byte_Array is array (Integer range <>) of Byte;
